prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年最低位次约3980名，2025年跃升至约3332名，一年间前移约648名，显示该校在京报考热度显著升温，竞争加剧；2024年、2025年及2026 年在京综合类招生计划均为10人，连续三年持平，无扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属中央军委，军事类院校中唯一985， 软科主榜未进入前200名，但社会认可度极高；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均无显著记录，舆情环境平稳，未出现负面事件冲击报考信心；计算机科学与技术、信息与通信工程、航空宇航科学与技术、系统科学等均为A级及以上学科，与该校在京招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、航空航天类、自动化 类）高度对应，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业为近年高热推荐方向，社会报考意愿强烈；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较 2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅约29.7%），考生规模大幅扩张，竞争压力显著上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的热度惯性 、2026年北京市考生总数激增带来的竞争加剧、招生计划持平无扩招缓解，以及该校计算机/电子信息类王牌专业持续高热，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年3332名基础上小幅 后移；预测最低位次约3382名，区间2882–3882名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、网络工程、信息安全等）
- 计算机科学与技术（天河拔尖班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程、微电子等）
- 自动化类（含自动化（无人机）、机器人工程、人工智能）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 航空航天类（含航空航天工程、飞行器动力工程、材料科学与工程）
- 理论与应用力学（航天力学拔尖班）
- 大气科学类（含大气科学、气象技术与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在3382名附近，区间2882–3882名。建议位次在区间下限（约2882名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档计算机类及天河拔尖班；位次在区间中部（约3382名）的考生以二档电 子信息类、自动化类为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（约3882名）附近的考生以三档航空航天类、理论与应用力学为稳妥选择，同时可尝试二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 3980, rising to about 3332 in 2025, moving forward by about 648 places in one year, indicating a significant increase in the popularity of this university in Beijing and intensified competition; the comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing for 2024, 2025, and 2026 is all 10 students, remaining unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, under the Central Military Commission, the only 985 among military academies, not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list, but with extremely high social recognition; there are no significant records in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, with a stable public opinion environment and no negative events impacting application confidence; Computer Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, and Systems Science are all A-level or above disciplines, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors in Beijing (Computer, Electronic Information, Aerospace, Automation), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended directions in recent years, with strong social application willingness; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 from 65,434 in 2025 (an increase of about 29.7%), with a significant expansion in the number of candidates and a marked increase in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the momentum of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the intensified competition due to the surge in the number of candidates in Beijing in 2026, the unchanged enrollment plan with no expansion, and the continued high popularity of the university's computer/electronic information flagship majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 ranking of 3332; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3382, with a range of 2882–3882.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Network Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology (Tianhe Top Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Category (including Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics, etc.)
- Automation Category (including Automation (UAV), Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Aerospace Category (including Aerospace Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering)
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Aerospace Mechanics Top Class)
- Atmospheric Science Category (including Atmospheric Science, Meteorological Technology and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 3382, with a range of 2882–3882. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (about 2882) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Computer Category and Tianhe Top Class; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 3382) should target Tier 2 Electronic Information Category and Automation Category as main directions, while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (about 3882) should choose Tier 3 Aerospace Category and Theoretical and Applied Mechanics as safe options, while also trying Tier 2 majors.
